articles.description: Four-time F1 world champion Max Verstappen tells BBC Sport he is "not enjoying" the sport after changes to the rules this season.
articles.title: Japanese Grand Prix: Max Verstappen says he is considering his future as he is 'not enjoying' new regulations

articles.description: Kimi Antonelli takes his second win in succession and the lead of the world championship at the Japanese Grand Prix.
articles.title: Japanese Grand Prix result: Kimi Antonelli wins from Oscar Piastri at Suzuka to become youngest championship leader

articles.description: Briton Moses Itauma thought 'did I really do that' after knocking out Jermaine Franklin with an uppercut in the fifth round of their fight in Manchester.
articles.title: Itauma vs Franklin: Moses Itauma wins step-up fight with crushing fifth round stoppage

articles.description: Follow live text coverage and radio commentary of three games in the Women's Super League including Chelsea vs Aston Villa, West Ham United vs London City Lionesses and Leicester City vs Brighton & Hove Albion.
articles.title: Women's Super League LIVE: Chelsea vs Aston Villa, West Ham United vs London City Lionesses & Leicester City vs Brighton & Hove Albion - radio, text, scores, match stats

articles.description: Did England manager Thomas Tuchel judge this international break correctly by naming such a large squad? Or was it a missed opportunity?
articles.title: Thomas Tuchel: Has England manager judged this international break correctly?

articles.description: BBC Sport looks at how Alvaro Arbeloa has managed to get the best out of the Real Madrid squad since his appointment in January.
articles.title: How is Alvaro Arbeloa getting best out of Real Madrid stars?

articles.description: The Milwaukee Bucks lose to the San Antonio Spurs and will miss the NBA play-offs for the first time since 2016.
articles.title: NBA: Milwaukee Bucks eliminated from playoff contention

articles.description: World number one Aryna Sabalenka follows her success at Indian Wells by retaining her Miami Open title, beating Coco Gauff in the final.
articles.title: Miami Open 2026: Aryna Sabalenka seals 'Sunshine Double' with win over Coco Gauff in final

articles.description: Willie Peters will leave Super League champions Hull KR at the end of the season to coach in his native Australia.
articles.title: Willie Peters: Hull KR coach to leave at end of season

articles.description: British Ice Skating appeals after Lilah Fear and Lewis Gibson miss out on an ice dance bronze medal at the World Figure Skating Championships.
articles.title: World Figure Skating Championships: Lilah Fear & Lewis Gibson miss bronze after 'illegal' penalty
